title: Quantity Surveyor (Electrical)
description:
Our esteemed client in the Electrical Engineering industry is seeking an Quantity Surveyor to join their dynamic team:

  • Employment Type: Permanent
  • Position: Quantity Surveyor
  • Location: North (Direct buses from Woodlands MRT station)
  • Working Hours: Mon to Fri, 9am to 6pm
  • Salary Package: Up to $4,800 + Bonus

Job Responsibilities:

  • Prepare project cost budgets and track changes in electrical design or site works, adjusting cost projections as needed.
  • Source and evaluate quotations from electrical contractors and subcontractors for price comparison and selection.
  • Handle claim submissions, follow-ups, and prepare monthly cost and value reports.
  • Prepare tender and contract documents, including bills of quantities, in coordination with consultants, engineers, and clients.
  • Perform quantity take-off and cost estimation for tendering of projects.
  • Administer project documentation including interim valuations, pricing, and variation claims.
  • Measure and verify completed electrical works to evaluate progress and subcontractor claims.
  • Review and advise the Project Manager on cost implications for specification or design variations.
  • Assist in final account settlement with clients, suppliers, and subcontractors.
  • Ensure compliance with company procedures and ISO Quality Management standards.
  • Perform other ad-hoc duties as assigned by Management.

Job Requirements:

  • At least Diploma in Quantity Surveying, Building, or Construction Management, or related discipline).
  • Minimum 2 years of experience as a Quantity Surveyor in the electrical engineering or M&E industry.
  • Strong knowledge of tender preparation, cost estimation, and contract administration.
  • Proficient in quantity take-off, variation analysis, and progress claims.
  • Familiar with local construction practices, codes, and contractual standards.


Ready to apply? Here’s how:

  • Click the APPLY button, or
  • Email your resume (in MS Word or PDF format) to adelin@intuitrecruitment.com. Include the job title in your email subject line for prompt processing.

Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


By submitting your application, you consent to the collection and use of your personal data under Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).
